description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended outward. She is wearing a fitted one-piece garment with thin shoulder straps, exposing her arms and legs. Her footwear consists of high-heeled, open-toe sandals with ankle straps. The figure's hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, with no visible accessories or carried items. The skin tone is fair, and the facial features are softly defined. The overall appearance suggests a casual yet stylish urban outfit suitable for warm weather.
description: A standing adult woman in a fitted one-piece outfit and high-heeled sandals, with her hair in a bun and arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fitted one-piece garment, exposed arms and legs, and high-heeled sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body, the bun hairstyle, and the sandal straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the one-piece garment, the bun hairstyle, and the heel details.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the body profile, arm position, and sandal straps from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted one-piece garment with thin shoulder straps
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: hair styled in a neat bun
